goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Run the Flask app, verify every feature end-to-end (tree, tags, search, doc view, wikilinks, backlinks, editor, hamburger), and fix any remaining issues in app.py, app.js, style.css, and index.html
Commit all web/ files and push to origin master
